美股與國際市場 ·

巴菲特慈善午餐復拍，匿名買家九百萬美元得標Buffett Charity Lunch Auction Returns With a $9M Winning Bid

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460949

  • eBay 慈善午餐拍賣由匿名買家以約九百萬美元（約新台幣二點八億）得標，下月24日將在奧馬哈與至多七名親友私下聚餐。
  • 庫里夫婦共同主辦本屆活動；巴菲特承諾依成交價「匹配捐款」，資助 GLIDE 基金會與 Eat.Learn.Play。
  • 這項午餐拍賣自2000年舉辦、疫情期間中斷後重啟；2008年起落槌多逾百萬美元，歷年累積募款可觀，2022年曾創高額紀錄。
  • 過去得主不乏專業投資人，例如段永平曾帶黃崢赴會；Weschler 亦曾得標，後與波克夏深化合作。
  • 巴菲特今年初卸任波克夏執行長；他透過已故前妻與 GLIDE 長年結緣，餐會延續慈善傳統。

巴菲特慈善午餐拍賣在暌違多年後於 eBay 復辦，匿名買家以九百萬美元得標；庫里夫婦共同主辦，巴菲特並承諾匹配捐款支援 GLIDE 與 Eat.Learn.Play，延續這項長年募款象徵。

  • An anonymous bidder paid about $9M (~NT$280M) on eBay for a private Omaha lunch on the 24th next month with up to seven guests.
  • Steph and Ayesha Curry co-host; Buffett pledged to match the winning bid for GLIDE and the Eat.Learn.Play foundation.
  • The lunch auction began in 2000, paused in the pandemic, and restarted; since 2008 bids often topped $1M, with a standout 2022 result.
  • Past winners include investors like Duan Yongping (who brought Colin Huang) and Ted Weschler, whose ties to Buffett later widened.
  • Buffett stepped down as Berkshire CEO this year; his GLIDE ties trace back through his late first wife, Susan.

Buffett's charity lunch auction is back on eBay with a $9M winning bid; the Currys co-host and Buffett will match funds for GLIDE and Eat.Learn.Play.
